fields.name: Source Template Name
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Source Name/No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the warehouse receipt number for which the cross-dock opportunity has been calculated.

fields.name: Source Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the warehouse receipt line to which the cross-dock opportunity relates.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the cross-dock opportunity.

fields.name: From Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of inbound document from which the items that can be cross-docked originated. These items can include a purchase order or a sales return order.

fields.name: From Source Subtype
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the subtype of the inbound document that can use the cross-docked items.
If the entry is created for a purchase document, then the value in the Document Type field on the document line is copied to this field.
If the entry is created for an inbound transfer, then the field contains 1.

fields.name: From Source No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the source number of the document from which the items to be cross-docked originated.
This field is copied from the No. field of the source document.

fields.name: From Source Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the source document from which the items to be cross-docked originated.

fields.name: From Source Subline No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the document line on the inbound source document that is copied to the outbound document line in this cross dock activity.

fields.name: From Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the items to be cross-docked came from, such as a purchase order or a sales return order.

fields.name: To Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document for which the cross-docked items could be used, such as a sales order, an outbound transfer, or a production order.

fields.name: To Source Subtype
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the subtype of the outbound document that can use the cross-docked items.
If the entry is created for a sales document, then the value in the Document Type field on the document line is copied to this field.
If the entry is created for a production order, then the field shows the status of the production order.
If the entry is created for an outbound transfer, then the field contains 0.

fields.name: To Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document for which items can be cross-docked.

fields.name: To Source Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the source document for which the cross-dock opportunity line can be used.

fields.name: To Source Subline No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the document line on the outbound source document that is copied from the inbound document line in this cross dock activity.

fields.name: To Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of source document for which the cross-dock opportunity can be used, such as sales order.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number of the items that can be cross-docked.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of base units of measure in which the item has been received.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location on the warehouse receipt line related to this cross-dock opportunity.

fields.name: Qty. Needed
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that is still needed on the document for which the items can be cross-docked.

fields.name: Qty. Needed (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that is needed to complete the outbound source document line, in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Qty. to Cross-Dock
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that is ready to cross-dock.

fields.name: Qty. to Cross-Dock (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity, in the base units of measure, that is ready to cross-dock.

fields.name: Qty. Cross-Docked (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity, in the base units of measure, that have been cross-docked.

fields.name: Total Qty. Needed (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the remaining quantity that the program will suggest to put into the cross-dock bin on the put-away document that is created when the receipt is posted.

fields.name: Reserved Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the item on the line reserved for the source document line.

fields.name: Reserved Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the item on the line reserved for the related source document line.

fields.name: To-Src. Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure code on the source document line that needs the cross-dock opportunity item.

fields.name: To-Src. Qty. per Unit of Meas.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of base units of measure, on the source document line, that needs the cross-dock opportunity items.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the outbound warehouse activity should be started.

fields.name: Pick Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item that is on pick instructions for the outbound source document, but that has not yet been registered as picked.

fields.name: Pick Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item that is on pick instructions for the outbound source document, but that has not yet been registered as picked.

fields.name: Picked Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item that has been registered as picked for the source document line.

fields.name: Picked Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item that has been registered as picked for the source document line. The quantity is in the base unit of measure.
